scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run --filter @undercover/server build && bun run --filter @undercover/web build
scripts.dev:web: bun run build:shared && bun run --filter @undercover/web dev
scripts.dev:server: bun run build:shared && bun run --filter @undercover/server start:dev
scripts.test: bun run build:shared && bun run --filter @undercover/shared test && bun run --filter @undercover/server test && bun run --filter @undercover/web test
